metodos.codigoOriginal:
LParameters poForm

ThisForm.cntSombra.lblSombra.Caption = ThisForm.Caption
ThisForm.cntSombra.lblTitulo.Caption = ThisForm.Caption

Set DataSession to poForm.DataSessionId

=DoDefault()

With ThisForm
	.ParentForm = poForm
	.pcEscolha = Iif(Type([ThisForm.ParentForm.pcEscolha])=[C], .ParentForm.pcEscolha, [CONSULTAR])
	.HouveIncl = .f.
	.HouveExcl = .f.

	llVis = InList(.pcEscolha,'INSERIR','ALTERAR')
	.cmdInserir.Visible = llVis
	.cmdInserir.Enabled = llVis
	.cmdExcluir.Visible = llVis
	.cmdEx... [TRUNCADO]

Local loLista
If (This.Tag <> This.Value)
	If Not Empty(This.Value)
		loLista = CreateObject('fwBuscaExt', ThisForm.Parentform.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCrRap', ;
							   'CrListaRemota', 'Codigos', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t., .f., [CGrus In ('] + crSigCdPro.CGrus + [', Space(3))])

		If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
			loLista.mAddColuna('Codigos', '', 'Código')
			loLista.mAddColuna('Descrs',  '', 'Descriçăo')
			loLista.Show()
		EndIf
		
		If (Lastkey() <> 27)
			lnReg = Recno('crSigPrCar')
			... [TRUNCADO]

Local lCod,lFan,xObj

Local loLista

If (This.Tag <> This.Value)
	If Not Empty(This.Value)
		loLista = CreateObject('fwBuscaExt', ThisForm.Parentform.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCrRap', ;
							   'CrListaRemota', 'Descrs', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t., .f., [CGrus In ('] + crSigCdPro.CGrus + [', Space(3))])

		If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
			loLista.mAddColuna('Descrs', '', 'Descriçăo')
			loLista.mAddColuna('Codigos',   '', 'Código')
			loLista.Show()
		EndIf
		
		If (Lastkey() <> 27)
			Select a... [TRUNCADO]

This.Tag = This.Value

Return InList(ThisForm.pcEscolha,'INSERIR','ALTERAR') And Empty(ThisForm.Grade.Column1.text1.Value)
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Select crSigPrCar

If Not Eof() And (crSigPrCar.CPros = crSigCdPro.CPros)
	Delete
	Skip
	Skip - 1
EndIf

ThisForm.HouveExcl = .T.
ThisForm.Grade.Refresh
* Fim **************************************************************************************

If Thisform.cmdInserir.Visible Or Thisform.cmdExcluir.Visible
	If( InList(ThisForm.pcescolha,'INSERIR','ALTERAR') ) 
		Select crSigPrCar
		Scan
			If IsEmpty(crSigPrCar.Codigos)
				Delete In crSigPrCar
			EndIf
		EndScan	
	EndIf
EndIf

ThisForm.ParentForm.Enabled = .T.

ThisForm.Release
* Fim **************************************************************************************

ThisForm.houveincl = .T.

Select crSigPrCar
Locate For CPros = crSigCdPro.CPros And Empty(Codigos)
If Eof()
	Insert Into crSigPrCar (CPros, pkChaves) Values (crSigCdPro.CPros, fUniqueIds())
EndIf

Select crSigPrCar
Thisform.Grade.Column1.SetFocus()
* Fim **************************************************************************************

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: Insert Into crSigPrCar (CPros, pkChaves) Values (crSigCdPro.CPros, fUniqueIds())
